ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "reg_no" TEXT /* Registration number of the candidate */,
  "roll_no" INTEGER /* Roll number of the candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate's registration (e.g., pending, rejected, selected) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES registration_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examinations" (
  "examination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination */,
  "examination_name" TEXT /* Name of the examination */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the examination */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the examination starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the examination ends */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration for the examination starts */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration for the examination ends */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the examination record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the examination record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registration_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, rejected, selected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., work experience certificate, educational qualification) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., pending, verified, rejected) */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was verified */,
  "rejected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was rejected */,
  "rejection_reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reason for rejection, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_rejection_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("rejection_reason_id") REFERENCES rejection_reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scrutiny_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., scrutiny official, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the official record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the official record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scrutiny_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official assigned to the task */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being scrutinized */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was assigned */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrutiny_tasks_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrutiny_tasks_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES scrutiny_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rejection_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the reason (e.g., incomplete application, invalid documents) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reason record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reason record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_examinations" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "examination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate registered for the examination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "examination_id")
)
